text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you! Birthday wishes from you two 
mean so much to me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe! We're not done yet! Because we… prepared this just for you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Wait… a V cake?! Oh, that brings me back! 
The Victory Club staff would always make 
them for us on our birthdays!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And of course, we also have the little 
message plaque too! All that's left is for 
you to write your goal for the year on it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
"Write down a big dream and then gobble 
it up", was it? Everyone always spent ages 
deciding what to write.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now then, let's move to the cafeteria kitchen!
We already have a chocolate pen waiting!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
…! …Hehe. Neither of you considered 
the possibility that I might not know 
what dream to write?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Of course not! We've been cheering you on 
as you chase your dream for years now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Write that French name nice and big! 
Oh, and if they're a bit tricky to spell…

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
Nope! I got this♪ Those were the very first 
words I learned how to write.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Laurel
text_block_list.text:
So I'll write them nice and big: 
"Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe"!
